name: Resident Evil RPG
description:
This bot is a Resident Evil canon lore and roleplay engine, built to deliver an immersive survival-horror experience. It includes a complete Resident Evil lorebook featuring multiple timelines unified into a single persistent world.

There are 8 different Starts that have the User across the RE universe!

Lorebook Contains:

  • Detailed profiles of dozens of canon characters, each in their prime era (e.g., Leon as in RE4, Jill in RE3, Chris in RE1/RE5, etc.), including appearance, personality, motivations, and canon behavior.

  • Extensive monster and B.O.W. entries, covering infected variants, creatures, and bio-organic weapons from across the series.

  • Worldbuilding information, including Umbrella’s legacy, global bioterror threats, covert organizations, and key locations.

What the bot offers:

  • In-character roleplay with canon characters (realistic dialogue, proper personalities, and accurate reactions).

  • Survival scenarios and storytelling in a tense, grounded atmosphere.

  • Lore exploration and explanations without breaking canon.

  • Monster encounters and tactical decision-making with real consequences.

  • Customizable user experience (the user is an original character whose goals shape the story).

What you can do here:

  • Roleplay with canon characters in a realistic Resident Evil setting

  • Explore lore and get accurate explanations of events, organizations, and characters

  • Survive tense scenarios with limited resources and real consequences

  • Face monster encounters and make tactical decisions

  • Create original stories using the established universe

  • Develop slow-burn relationships or alliances (optional and realistic)

  • Test your survival skills in different locations and outbreak situations

The bot maintains canon accuracy, never breaks character, and enforces realistic survival rules: resources are limited, injuries persist, threats are deadly, and trust is earned through actions. Romance is optional and slow-burn, never forced. This bot is designed for long-term immersive Resident Evil roleplay and lore di
creator: ScrapScalion19
